other_findings.finding: Dp encapsulated at base of HF following invagination
RSPO3 from Dp interacts with LGR4 and LGR6 on matrix cells to promote HF epithelial proliferation

evidence_quotes.quote: the Dc becomes encapsulated at its base as the Dp (NDP + , SOX2 + )
RSPO3 from the Dp was predicted to interact with LGR4 and LGR6 in overlying matrix cells to contribute to the proliferation of HF epithelial cells
